2606.18108.title: Querying an astronomical database using large language models: the ALeRCE text-to-SQL system
2606.18108.paper_summary: We develop a text-to-SQL (structured query language) system based on large language models (LLMs) using in-context learning and apply it to the Automatic Learning for the Rapid Classification of Events (ALeRCE) astronomical database. ALeRCE is a community broker for the Zwicky Transient Facility and the Vera C. Rubin Observatory. The system enables users to query the database in natural language (NL) and generates executable SQL queries. To develop and evaluate the system, we constructed a dataset of 110 NL/SQL pairs. We propose a step-by-step generation framework comprising four modules: schema linking, query classification, prompt decomposition, and self-correction. The performance of thirteen LLMs is evaluated using in-context learning and prompt engineering techniques. Text-to-SQL performance is assessed using the perfect-match (PM) rate for row identifiers (e.g., object identifiers) and column identifiers (i.e., column names). The proposed step-by-step framework consistently outperforms a direct-inference baseline, while the self-correction module consistently reduces execution errors. For Claude Opus 4.6, PM performance on row (column) identifiers is high for simple queries, reaching 0.97 (0.94), and decreases with query complexity to 0.44 (0.72) for medium queries and 0.59 (0.49) for hard queries. Among the thirteen evaluated models, the best-performing LLMs for the text-to-SQL task are Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 2.5 Pro, Gemini 3 Flash, and GPT-5.2-Codex.
2606.18108.paper_summary_zh: 我們開發了一個基於大型語言模型（LLMs）的文本到 SQL（結構化查詢語言）系統，使用上下文學習並將其應用於自動學習快速事件分類（ALeRCE）天文數據庫。ALeRCE 是 Zwicky 瞬變設施和 Vera C. Rubin 天文台的社區經紀人。該系統使得用戶能夠以自然語言（NL）查詢數據庫並生成可執行的 SQL 查詢。為了開發和評估該系統，我們構建了一個包含 110 對 NL/SQL 的數據集。我們提出了一個由四個模塊組成的逐步生成框架：模式連結、查詢分類、提示分解和自我修正。使用上下文學習和提示工程技術評估了十三個 LLM 的性能。文本到 SQL 的性能通過行標識符（例如對象標識符）和列標識符（即列名）的完美匹配（PM）率來評估。所提出的逐步框架始終優於直接推斷基準，而自我修正模塊則始終減少執行錯誤。對於 Claude Opus 4.6，簡單查詢的行（列）標識符的 PM 性能較高，達到 0.97（0.94），並隨著查詢複雜度的增加而下降，對於中等查詢降至 0.44（0.72），對於困難查詢降至 0.59（0.49）。在評估的十三個模型中，文本到 SQL 任務表現最佳的 LLM 是 Claude Opus 4.6、Gemini 2.5 Pro、Gemini 3 Flash 和 GPT-5.2-Codex。
2606.18108.author: P. A. Estevez et.al.
2606.18108.authors: P. A. Estevez, J. Espejo-Moreira, S. Sanfeliu-Alvarez, F. Forster, A. M. Munoz Arancibia, G. Cabrera-Vives, F. E. Bauer, A. Bayo, M. Catelan, R. Dastidar, L. Hernandez-Garcia, J. A. Intriago, G. Pignata
